stemHtml: Which of the following statements is true when comparing an LCD to a CRT display in the EFIS?

options.a: LCD has a lower voltage supply than CRT, so it uses less power.
options.b: CRT displayed images can only be seen in a dark cockpit.
options.c: Modern commercial aircraft are mostly equipped with CRT displays.
options.d: LCD displays can provide less information because it is only refreshed once per second.
